category: AI Security (LLM02)
description: PII or sensitive data flows into or out of LLM without redaction — information disclosure risk
remediation: Scrub PII before sending to model APIs and filter model output before returning to users. Use libraries like presidio, scrubadub, or pii-catcher. OWASP LLM02:2025.
deadline_note: Current law: 2 Aug 2026. Omnibus proposes: 2 Dec 2027 (Annex III). Trilogue in progress.

category: AI Credential Governance (Article 15)
description: Private key detected in AI system code. Article 15 requires cybersecurity measures for high-risk systems. Fix: Never include private keys in commands. Use SSH agent or key file path.
deadline_note: Article 15 cybersecurity requirements. Current law: 2 Aug 2026.

category: Agent Autonomy (OWASP Agentic ASI02 Tool Misuse / ASI04 Missing Guardrails)
description: Agent tool infrastructure: File system modification — no human gate detected
deadline_note: Article 14 human oversight. Current law: 2 Aug 2026. Omnibus proposes: 2 Dec 2027.

category: Agent Autonomy (OWASP Agentic ASI02 Tool Misuse / ASI04 Missing Guardrails)
description: Agent tool infrastructure: System command execution — no human gate detected
deadline_note: Article 14 human oversight. Current law: 2 Aug 2026. Omnibus proposes: 2 Dec 2027.

description: Agent tool infrastructure: System command execution — no human gate detected
deadline_note: Article 14 human oversight. Current law: 2 Aug 2026. Omnibus proposes: 2 Dec 2027.

category: Agent Autonomy (OWASP Agentic ASI02 Tool Misuse / ASI04 Missing Guardrails)
description: Agent tool infrastructure: System command execution — no human gate detected
deadline_note: Article 14 human oversight. Current law: 2 Aug 2026. Omnibus proposes: 2 Dec 2027.

category: Agent Autonomy (OWASP Agentic ASI02 Tool Misuse / ASI04 Missing Guardrails)
description: AI output may flow to File system modification — no human gate detected
deadline_note: Article 14 human oversight. Current law: 2 Aug 2026. Omnibus proposes: 2 Dec 2027.

category: AI Security (LLM01)
description: Tool / agent / shell output passed to LLM without validation — agentic prompt injection risk
remediation: Treat tool outputs as untrusted user input. Validate structure (JSON schema), strip control tokens, apply a guardrails layer. Maps to OWASP Agentic ASI04 (control-flow hijacking). OWASP LLM01:2025.
deadline_note: Current law: 2 Aug 2026. Omnibus proposes: 2 Dec 2027 (Annex III). Trilogue in progress.

category: AI Security (LLM05)
description: Unsafe model deserialization — arbitrary code execution risk
remediation: Use safetensors format or torch.load(path, weights_only=True). Never unpickle untrusted model files.
deadline_note: Current law: 2 Aug 2026. Omnibus proposes: 2 Dec 2027 (Annex III). Trilogue in progress.

category: AI Security (LLM06)
description: AI API call detected — verify error handling is in place
remediation: Ensure AI API calls are wrapped in try/except. Handle rate limits, timeouts, and malformed responses. Required by CRA Annex I secure-by-design.
deadline_note: Current law: 2 Aug 2026. Omnibus proposes: 2 Dec 2027 (Annex III). Trilogue in progress.

category: AI Security (LLM02)
description: PII or sensitive data flows into or out of LLM without redaction — information disclosure risk
remediation: Scrub PII before sending to model APIs and filter model output before returning to users. Use libraries like presidio, scrubadub, or pii-catcher. OWASP LLM02:2025.
deadline_note: Current law: 2 Aug 2026. Omnibus proposes: 2 Dec 2027 (Annex III). Trilogue in progress.

category: Safety Components
description: Safety components under Union harmonisation legislation

observations.observation: RAG (retrieval-augmented generation) pipeline detected — external data is injected at inference time. Article 10 data governance requirements apply to retrieved data, not only training data. Consider: data source provenance, freshness, access controls, and bias in the retrieval corpus.

deadline_note: Current law: 2 Aug 2026. Omnibus proposes: 2 Aug 2028 (Annex I / sectoral). Trilogue in progress.

category: Annex III, Category 4(b)
description: Worker monitoring and task allocation

observations.observation: Training data detected — Article 10 requires data to be relevant, representative, and examined for biases.
No logging detected — Article 12 requires automatic recording of events for traceability.

deadline_note: Current law: 2 Aug 2026. Omnibus proposes: 2 Dec 2027 (Annex III). Trilogue in progress.
